description: Enforcement rules for all GhostClaw blueprints and agent executions

one-agent-per-site.description: Each site is assigned to exactly one agent. That agent completes the entire site end-to-end.

site_config_required.description: Every site build must have a valid SITE_CONFIG.json. No site can be built without one.

no-placeholder-content.description: No placeholder text, fake phone numbers, lorem ipsum, or [brackets] allowed in any output.

deploy-ready-output.description: All outputs must be immediately deployable without human editing or cleanup.
